Title: Cognitive Behavioural Therapy for Treatment-Resistant Depression: A Randomised Controlled Trial
Abstract: RCT comparing CBT augmentation to treatment-as-usual in 120 adults with TRD; CBT group showed significantly higher remission rates at 16-week endpoint.

Title: Dialectical Behaviour Therapy Skills Training in Recurrent Major Depression: Efficacy and Tolerability
Abstract: Randomised trial of DBT skills group versus waitlist in 98 participants with recurrent MDD meeting TRD criteria; significant symptom reduction and acceptable dropout.

Title: Long-Term Outcomes of CBT versus DBT in Adults with Treatment-Resistant Depression: A Comparative Cohort Study
Abstract: Prospective cohort comparing CBT and DBT completers over 24 months; DBT showed superior relapse prevention at 2-year follow-up despite similar acute remission rates.

Title: Dropout Predictors and Adherence in Psychotherapy for Treatment-Resistant Depression
Abstract: Secondary analysis of four TRD psychotherapy trials examining dropout predictors; baseline severity and homework non-compliance were strongest predictors across both CBT and DBT.

Title: Remission Rates in CBT Augmentation Trials for TRD: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis
Abstract: Meta-analysis of 12 RCTs (n=1,240) examining CBT augmentation in TRD; pooled remission rate of 44% versus 23% for control conditions.
